Beau Burbridge, Esq. 415-986-3339 of Walker Hamilton Koenig & Burbridge for Plaintiff Laurie Baker-Flynn.
Robert Baker, Esq. 213-241-0900 of Baker Keener & Nahra LLP for Defendant WESTERN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WESTERN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant Western General Insurance Company' motion for summary judgment is denied. (see word minutes for full details.)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
